title: dennstaedtia cicutaria var. incisa
intro: Dennstaedtia cicutaria var. incisa, also known as the Japanese fern, is a type of fern native to Japan and other parts of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve circulation. The health benefits of Dennstaedtia cicutaria var. incisa include reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease, improving respiratory function, and acting as an antiviral agent. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and processed into teas, infusions, or extracts, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine and other Asian herbal remedies.
